description_long: This object is a classic CRT television with a deep, boxy rear housing and a flat, wide front screen. The front features a prominent display area, currently showing a colorful movie poster for 'The Goonies,' surrounded by a thick, matte black bezel. The sides and back are curved and extend significantly backward, characteristic of older cathode ray tube designs, with no visible vents or ports. The housing appears to be made of hard black plastic, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance. There are no visible buttons, dials, or branding on the exterior surfaces. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and function rather than slimness or modern aesthetics.
description: A bulky, black CRT television with a thick bezel and a deep, curved rear housing, featuring a movie poster on its screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display area with 'The Goonies' poster and a thick black bezel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the deep, curved rear housing typical of CRT televisions.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the full depth and boxy shape of the television's back.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, emphasizing the extended rear and solid construction.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, black, matte plastic bezel with no visible styling features
